series_metadata.series_description: Include project applications, fiscal reports, activity reports, on site monitoring reports, correspondence regarding projects and child count data for Title VI-B projects.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Electronic: three years, grant closure. provided audit has been conducted by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies areresolved. ; Paper: three years, grant closure. provided audit has been conducted by Auditor of State, audit report is released, and all discrepancies areresolved
